text.message: I don’t have any wheat, not sure why you let all stealing

this has been a brutal start
oj is close to 7, so are you, but I am leading

look at red, 2 ports and road from longest...
We see red.  But that doesn't mean they're ahead of you
I have no means to cut you off

that I don't produce road mats
pretty much every 5 or 8 gives you road
giving the game to red with that
but you have to actually take it soon
sorry didnt expect you to go there
Doesn’t matter black still wins lol
but dont think its worth using
only got 2 wood and a sheep
